subcodes.first_line: O Khan! The Wronged One of the contingent world hath turned toward thee from the precincts of the Prison, and summoneth thee unto the grace, mercy and loving-kindness of God, the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خان مظلوم امکان از شطر سجن بتو توجه نمود و ترا بعنایت و رحمت و شفقت حق جل
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men
